hero.headline: Manage your barbershop & salon. Effortlessly.
hero.subheadline: trafti connects barbershop owners with customers through an all-in-one booking, POS, and staff management platform.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Complete tools for the modern barbershop & salon

items.title: Point of Sale (POS)
items.desc: Fast and accurate digital cashier. Record transactions, manage inventory, and print receipts with ease.

items.title: Staff Management
items.desc: Schedule shifts, track commissions, and monitor each artist's performance from one dashboard.

items.title: Online Booking
items.desc: Accept bookings from the Customer App 24/7. No more chaotic WhatsApp booking management.

items.title: Customer Loyalty
items.desc: Build customer loyalty with reward points, exclusive promos, and automatic notifications.

items.title: Analytics & Reports
items.desc: Monitor revenue, top services, and business performance in real-time from anywhere.

items.title: Multi-Branch
items.desc: Manage multiple branches under one account. Centralized reports, full control.

steps.title: Sign Up & Subscribe
steps.desc: Download the Merchant App, create an account, and choose the plan that fits your shop.

steps.title: Set Up Your Shop
steps.desc: Add services, prices, hours, and staff profiles. Done in minutes.

steps.title: Receive Bookings from the App
steps.desc: Customers book directly from the Customer App. Just confirm and serve.

forMerchant.title: Grow Revenue, Reduce Hassle
forMerchant.subtitle: trafti is built specifically for barbershop and salon owners who want to scale without operational complexity.
benefits: Reduce no-shows with automatic customer reminders
Manage staff and commissions without spreadsheets
Real-time financial reports at your fingertips
Accept digital and cash payments in one cashier

forCustomer.title: Book Your Favorite Barbershop
forCustomer.subtitle: Find, book, and pay for your favorite barbershop & salon services anytime, anywhere.

pricingPreview.title: Transparent Pricing, No Hidden Fees
pricingPreview.subtitle: Start free, upgrade anytime as your business grows.

items.q: Is there a setup fee or contract?
items.a: None. You can start for free without a credit card, and there's no long-term contract. Upgrade or cancel anytime.

items.q: How long does it take to set up my shop?
items.a: Most shop owners finish setup in 15–30 minutes. Our support team is ready to help if you run into any issues.

items.q: Do my customers need to download an app?
items.a: Yes, customers use the Customer App (available on App Store & Play Store) to browse and book. The app is free for customers.

items.q: Can I manage more than one branch?
items.a: Absolutely! The multi-branch feature is available on the Pro plan. Manage all branches from one account with centralized reports.
trafti supports cash, QRIS, bank transfer, and digital wallets like GoPay and OVO.
Data security is our top priority. All data is stored in encrypted servers and automatically backed up daily.

items.q: Can it be used without an internet connection?
items.a: Basic POS features work offline. Data syncs automatically when your connection is restored.

items.q: How do I contact support if I have a problem?
items.a: You can reach our support team via in-app chat, email, or WhatsApp. Pro plan subscribers get priority support.

finalCta.title: Ready to Take Your Shop to the Next Level?
finalCta.subtitle: Join thousands of barbershops already growing with trafti

docs.title: How to Use trafti
docs.subtitle: Complete step-by-step guides for shop owners (Merchant App) and customers (Customer App).

merchant.title: Merchant App Guide
merchant.subtitle: For barbershop & salon owners managing their shop with trafti.

steps.title: Download & Create an Account
steps.desc: Download the Merchant App from the App Store or Play Store, then sign up with your business phone number and email.

steps.title: Choose a Subscription Plan
steps.desc: Pick the Free, Growth, or Pro plan that fits your shop. You can upgrade anytime.

steps.title: Set Up Your Shop Profile
steps.desc: Add your shop name, address, operating hours, and photos so your shop stands out in the Customer App.

steps.title: Add Services & Prices
steps.desc: Enter your list of services such as haircuts or shaves, along with their prices and estimated duration.

steps.title: Add Staff & Commissions
steps.desc: Register your artists or staff, set their work schedules, and define each person's commission scheme.

steps.title: Enable Online Booking
steps.desc: Turn on online booking so customers can reserve directly from the Customer App 24/7.

steps.title: Manage Transactions with POS
steps.desc: Record daily transactions, accept cash or QRIS payments, and print receipts with ease.

steps.title: Track Your Reports
steps.desc: Monitor revenue, top services, and staff performance in real-time from your dashboard.

customer.title: Customer App Guide
customer.subtitle: For customers who want to book their favorite barbershop & salon.

steps.title: Download the Customer App
steps.desc: Download the trafti Customer app for free from the App Store or Play Store.

steps.title: Create an Account
steps.desc: Sign up quickly using your phone number or Google account.

steps.title: Find a Barbershop
steps.desc: Discover nearby barbershops & salons or search directly for your favorite shop.

steps.title: Choose Service & Schedule
steps.desc: Select a service, artist, date, and available time slot that works for you.

steps.title: Confirm Your Booking
steps.desc: Review your order details and confirm. You'll receive a reminder notification.

steps.title: Show Up & Pay
steps.desc: Arrive on schedule, enjoy the service, and pay through the app or on-site.

steps.title: Earn Points & Leave a Review
steps.desc: Collect loyalty points on every visit and leave a review for your favorite barbershop.

help.title: Need more help?
help.desc: Our support team is ready to help if you have any questions or run into issues.

cookie.title: We use cookies
cookie.desc: We use cookies to improve your experience on this site. Analytics and marketing cookies require your consent.
cookie.analyticsDesc: Helps us understand how visitors use the site.
